name: HouseCanary Real Estate Analytics API
what_it_does: HouseCanary REST API for real estate analytics and property valuation data platform. Enables AI agents to access automated valuation models (AVM) for single-family properties, handle property details and characteristic data retrieval, access neighborhood and market analytics data, retrieve property value forecasting and appreciation predictions, manage comp analysis and comparable sales data, handle rental estimate and yield data, access census and demographic market data, retrieve flood and environmental risk data, manage bulk property analytics for portfolio assessment, and integrate property valuation data with mortgage, lending, investment, and insurance workflows.
use_cases: Getting automated property valuations from mortgage origination agents
Analyzing market trends for property investment from real estate intelligence agents
Accessing comp analysis for appraisal from lending automation agents
Retrieving rental estimates from investment underwriting agents
not_for: Commercial real estate without single-family residential focus
International property markets outside US coverage
Real-time MLS listing data without historical valuation analytics
best_when: A mortgage lender, real estate investor, or proptech company using HouseCanary wants AI agents to automate property valuation, comp analysis, market analytics, portfolio assessment, and lending decision support.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: AVM values are model-based estimates — should not replace licensed appraisals for regulated lending decisions in jurisdictions requiring appraisals. Valuation data has a shelf life — automated decisions must use current data, not cached values.

auth.notes: HouseCanary uses API key authentication with HTTP Basic Auth. Username (API key) and secret. Developer documentation at api-docs.housecanary.com. No native webhooks. Rate-limited by plan tier. Bulk analytics endpoints for portfolio processing. FCRA-compliant data products for lending use cases.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per API call pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-call pricing for AVM, analytics, and market data; volume discounts available
pricing.notes: San Francisco, California. Founded 2013. Real estate analytics platform. $65M+ raised. 50M+ residential properties covered. FCRA-compliant AVM for regulated lending. Canopy platform for lending and capital markets. Competes with CoreLogic and ATTOM for real estate analytics APIs.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per plan tier; bulk batch API for high volume

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: AVM values are estimates — for FIRREA/regulated lending, AVM may not replace licensed appraisal; verify jurisdiction requirements
FCRA compliance — for lending decisions, ensure FCRA-compliant data products are used with required adverse action notices
US-only coverage — residential properties in US only; no international property data
Data freshness — AVM models update periodically; cache invalidation policy should match data refresh cadence
Basic auth pattern — API key as HTTP Basic username with secret as password; non-standard for modern OAuth flows
Per-call billing — monitor API usage to avoid unexpected costs in high-volume automation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Real estate analytics. FCRA, SOC2. Basic auth. US only. Property valuation and market data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Real estate analytics. FCRA, SOC2. Basic auth. US only. Property valuation and market data.
